title: Develop a monitoring, evaluation and reporting program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a monitoring, evaluation and reporting program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define terms of reference and evaluation context

pcs.text: Identify and clarify the preferred outcomes of the monitoring, evaluation and reporting program, who will use the information and for what purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and clarify the preferred outcomes of the monitoring, evaluation and reporting program, who will use the information and for what purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and clarify the preferred outcomes of the monitoring, evaluation and reporting program, who will use the information and for what purpose.

pcs.text: Identify the key stakeholders who will be consulted
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the key stakeholders who will be consulted?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the key stakeholders who will be consulted.

pcs.text: Select evaluation and monitoring methods that are suitable to the size and significance of the program, and the terms of reference
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select evaluation and monitoring methods that are suitable to the size and significance of the program, and the terms of reference?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select evaluation and monitoring methods that are suitable to the size and significance of the program, and the terms of reference.

pcs.text: Complete a review of existing evidence and literature relevant to the proposed evaluation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete a review of existing evidence and literature relevant to the proposed evaluation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete a review of existing evidence and literature relevant to the proposed evaluation.

pcs.text: Develop an approach to monitoring and evaluating a project or production that supports broader management targets, Natural Resource Management standards, targets and outputs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop an approach to monitoring and evaluating a project or production that supports broader management targets, Natural Resource Management standards, targets and outputs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop an approach to monitoring and evaluating a project or production that supports broader management targets, Natural Resource Management standards, targets and outputs.

elements.title: Identify the key stages and outcomes of the program

pcs.text: Define key stages, milestones and timeframe

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define key stages, milestones and timeframe.

pcs.text: Communicate the details of the program and delivery timeline for endorsement with clients and stakeholders

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate the details of the program and delivery timeline for endorsement with clients and stakeholders.

pcs.text: Identify potential risks that may impact on the proposed program

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential risks that may impact on the proposed program.

pcs.text: Refine targets and objectives to minimise risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refine targets and objectives to minimise risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refine targets and objectives to minimise risks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify the key stages and outcomes of the program

elements.title: Define reporting and record keeping requirements for data management

pcs.text: Identify data collection, management and reporting requirements to meet the objectives of the program

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify data collection, management and reporting requirements to meet the objectives of the program.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify existing data sets that may be accessed for the program.

pcs.text: Design data collection protocols so relevant standards and required formats are met

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design data collection protocols so relevant standards and required formats are met.

pcs.text: Identify the information products required, taking clients and stakeholders' needs into account, and use in decision making

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the information products required, taking clients and stakeholders' needs into account, and use in decision making.
